Class MatchResult

java.lang.Object
shelter.service.model.MatchResult
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<MatchResult>
public class MatchResult extends Object implements Comparable<MatchResult>
Represents the result of a single match between an animal and an adopter. Holds both parties and the computed score, supporting both forward and reverse matching directions. Results are naturally ordered by score descending, allowing ranked lists to be sorted directly.

  • Constructor Details

    • MatchResult

      public MatchResult(Animal animal, Adopter adopter, int score)
      Constructs a MatchResult with the given animal, adopter, and score. Higher scores indicate a stronger compatibility between the two parties. Neither animal nor adopter may be null.
      Parameters:
      animal - the animal involved in this match; must not be null
      adopter - the adopter involved in this match; must not be null
      score - the computed match score
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if animal or adopter is null

    • MatchResult

      public MatchResult(MatchResult other)
      Copy constructor that creates a new MatchResult with all field values copied from other. The copy preserves the same animal reference, adopter reference, and score.
      Parameters:
      other - the MatchResult instance to copy; must not be null

  • Method Details

    • getAnimal

      public Animal getAnimal()
      Returns the animal associated with this match result. Never null for a validly constructed result.
      Returns:
      the matched animal

    • getAdopter

      public Adopter getAdopter()
      Returns the adopter associated with this match result. Never null for a validly constructed result.
      Returns:
      the matched adopter

    • getScore

      public int getScore()
      Returns the match score for this result. Higher values indicate greater compatibility between the animal and adopter.
      Returns:
      the computed score

    • compareTo

      public int compareTo(MatchResult other)
      Compares this result to another by score in descending order. A result with a higher score is ordered before one with a lower score, so that sorting a list of MatchResults places the best matches first.
      Specified by:
      compareTo in interface Comparable<MatchResult>
      Parameters:
      other - the other MatchResult to compare to
      Returns:
      a negative number if this result has a higher score, positive if lower, zero if equal

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this match result including animal, adopter, and score.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      a human-readable description of this match result

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object o)
      Returns true if the given object is a MatchResult with the same animal, adopter, and score. Equality is value-based since match results have no unique ID.
      Overrides:
      equals in class Object
      Parameters:
      o - the object to compare
      Returns:
      true if all fields are equal

    • hashCode

      public int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code based on animal, adopter, and score. Consistent with equals(Object).
      Overrides:
      hashCode in class Object
      Returns:
      the hash code
